title: goodenia suffrutescens
intro: Goodenia suffrutescens, also known as bush goodenia, is a flowering plant native to Australia. It has been traditionally used in indigenous medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The plant has been reported to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation and soothing skin irritations, making it a popular remedy for skin conditions like eczema and acne. Goodenia suffrutescens is often used in herbal preparations, including teas and infusions, which can be consumed to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
